description: You are logged in to Visallo as user 'analyst' and viewing the graph workspace. A CSV file containing Panama Papers offshore entity data is at /home/ga/Documents/panama_papers_entities.csv. Import this file into Visallo by dragging it from the file manager onto the graph view, or by using the import/upload feature in the Visallo interface. After import, the file should appear as a document entity in the graph.
